description: Centralised market data aggregation and distribution service for FX quant applications. Ingests tick-level data from Reuters, Bloomberg, EBS, and Cboe FX via low-latency adapters. Provides normalised real-time spot rates, forward points, deposit rates, and option volatilities for 60+ currency pairs. For AUD/USD, the service enriches standard FX data with correlated commodity feeds (iron-ore SGX futures, copper LME) and macro indicators (RBA cash rate, AU employment data). Supports both push (WebSocket/gRPC streaming) and pull (REST snapshot) consumption patterns. Historical data API provides tick, 1-min, hourly, and daily bars going back to 2010.
endpoints:
GET /api/v2/marketdata/spot/{ccyPair} — real-time spot rate
GET /api/v2/marketdata/forward/{ccyPair} — forward points term structure
GET /api/v2/marketdata/vol-surface/{ccyPair} — implied volatility surface
GET /api/v2/marketdata/history/{ccyPair} — historical time series
WS /ws/v2/marketdata/stream — WebSocket streaming endpoint
